title: BUBUSTEIN's Money Mod
description:
Ever dreamed of a realistic economy in Minecraft? 

Your search ends here! Bubustein's Money Mod brings 28 real-world currencies, advanced banking systems, and immersive economic gameplay to your world. (with cards, coins, banknotes, cash)
body:
# 💰 Bubustein's Money Mod
### 🌟 Transform your Minecraft world into a realistic economy! 🌟 [![Roleplay](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus-east-1.tixte.net%2Fuploads%2Fbubustein.tixte.co%2Froleplay_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bubustein) [![Vanilla +](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus-east-1.tixte.net%2Fuploads%2Fbubustein.tixte.co%2Fvanilla1_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bubusteins-vanilla)
--- ## 🚀 What makes this mod special? > **Ever dreamed of a realistic economy in Minecraft?** Your search ends here! Bubustein's Money Mod brings **28 real-world currencies**, advanced banking systems, and immersive economic gameplay to your world. ### ✨ **Key Features** 🏦 **Advanced Banking System** - ATMs for easy money management - Secure card-based transactions using commands (`/bubustein help`) - Multiple card types with different tax rates 💱 **Professional Trading** - Banker villagers with exclusive trades - Currency exchange services - Regional currencies in village houses - 🔥 Want netherite without touching lava? 💸 Buy it. Want enchanted gear without grinding XP for hours? 💱Trade it. With the right currency in hand, the Banker🏛️ becomes your market plug for **OP** loot. 🌍 **28 Global Currencies** - From USD and EUR to exotic currencies like ISK and PHP - Realistic banknotes and coins - Historical currencies (ROL 1900-1906) 🏛️ **Custom Structures** - Luxurious mansions with valuable loot - Desert castles and jungle huts - Regional bank buildings --- ## 🎮 **NEW in v.x.1.0 RELEASE** ### 🔥 Major Updates - **💳🏦 ATM GUI** - New ATM GUI - **⚡ADVANCED Banking System** - based on IBANs, new commands, and more! - **💳 Added Credit Cards** ## 🎮 **NEW in v.x.0.12** ### 🔥 Major Updates - **🔑 Bank Security System** - New KEY item required for Bank Machine access - **🏗️ 8 New Landmarks** - From cozy cottages to mysterious abandoned mansions - **💳 Advanced Cards** - Rusty Card (10% tax) to Supreme Card (0% tax) - **🌐 Multilingual Support** - Now supports 7 languages including Romanian, German, Polish! - **⚡ Enhanced Commands** - Use `/bubustein help` for the complete command system --- ## 🌍 **All Available Currencies**
| Region | Currencies | |--------|------------| | 🇪🇺 **Europe** | EUR, GBP, CHF, NOK, DKK, SEK, HUF, PLN, RSD, ISK, CZK, RON, ROL, MDL | | 🌎 **Americas** | USD, CAD, BRL, MXN | | 🌏 **Asia-Pacific** | JPY, CNY, INR, KRW, AUD, NZD, PHP | | 🌍 **Africa & Middle East** | ZAR, TRY, EGP |

--- ## 🛠️ **Installation & Requirements** ### **Prerequisites:** - **Fabric/Quilt:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) + [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - **(Neo)Forge:** [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) ### **Recommended:** - **Dark Theme:** [Bubustein's Dark Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bubustein-dark-textures) for the ultimate experience --- ## 📊 **Version Compatibility**
| Minecraft Version | Version | Forge | Fabric | NeoForge | |-------------------|---------|-------|--------|----------| | **1.16.5** | 1.x.y | 🪦 | 🪦 | ⛔ | | **1.20.1** | 5.x.y | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | **1.21.1** | 8.x.y | ⛔ | ✅ | ✅ | | **1.21.11** | 12.x.y | ⛔ | ✅ | ✅ | | **26.1.2** | 13.x.y | ⛔ | ✅ | ✅ |
**Legend:** ✅ Active Development | 🍂 Occasional Updates | ⛔ Not Available | 🪦 No More Updates --- ## 🔄 **Latest Changelog - v.x.1.0**
🎉 Click to see all improvements! ## **💳🏦 ATM GUI** - New ATM GUI - You can now deposit and withdraw using the ATM GUI (also commands) ## **⚡ADVANCED Banking System** - based on IBANs, new commands, and more! - Create an account using `/bubustein createAccount` command - Link the IBAN to your card - Done! ## **💳 Added Credit Cards** - Added 3 credit cards with different interests.
--- ## 🤝 **Community & Support**
### 🦸‍♂️ **Become a Beta Tester!** Help us squash bugs and shape the future of the mod! **[Apply Here](https://forms.gle/nkQWZdhY35XHMFWU9)** *(Join Discord first)*
--- ## 📜 **Legal & Licensing** ### Important Notice This mod is a **fictional entertainment project** for Minecraft gameplay only. It is not affiliated with any real financial institutions or government bodies. **Visual Assets Policy:** - All currency textures are heavily modified and low-resolution - Only one side of each banknote/coin is used - No assets can be used for counterfeiting purposes - Sources comply with Creative Commons licensing **Legal Intent:** - This mod **does not promote or support counterfeiting**, forgery, or any illegal activity involving real-world money. - The currency depicted in this mod **cannot be printed, extracted, or used as legal tender**. - All money items are strictly fictional and only exist inside the Minecraft game as digital assets. - Use of these textures is purely artistic, for creative or roleplay gameplay, and intended to simulate a fantasy economic environment. **Mod License:** GNU LGPL v3 --- ## 📦 **Modpack Usage Policy** ### ✅ **Allowed:** - **Modrinth uploads** with proper credit ### ⚠️ **CurseForge:** - Must use official CurseForge version - **NO file overrides permitted** ---
## 🌟 **Ready to revolutionize your Minecraft economy?** ### [**Download Now**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bubustein-money/versions) | [**Join Discord**](https://dsc.gg/bubustein) | [**Support Development**](https://ko-fi.com/bubustein) --- *Made with ❤️ by BUBUSTEIN | © 2023-2026*
